Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Continued To Apr-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for administrator Maria Vargas. Parties have reached an agreement. They are waiting for one consent. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Matter is continued to 4/30. Counsel will file a petition for final distribution.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Continued To Apr-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato (Counsel for Maria Vargas, Personal Representative).

Mr. Kato appeared at the continuance call to request that the matter be continued. After brief discussion, the Court granted the request and continued the hearings in this matter to April 9, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Petition To Determine Title To & Require Transfer Of Personal & Real Property To Estate.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Amended Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Continued To Mar-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for administrator. Terence Murphy appearing for and with Cynthia Martinez. Ms. Martinez has filed and amended first account. Mr. Kato is objecting the the accounting. Both counsel agreed to Pro Bono Mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 3/16. Matter is continued to 3/19 for further status. Mr. Murphy to file a petition for approval of the accounting by 3/2 and set it for hearing on 3/19.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Amended Accounting By Cynthia Martinez
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Title To & Require Transfer Of Personal & Real Property To Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for administrator Maria Vargas. Terence Murphy appearing for Cynthia Martinez. Ms. Martinez is in the hallway. Mr. Murphy has filed an inventory. He does not know he needed to file an accounting. Court read the minutes from the last hearing and the Court did order Ms. Martinez to file an verified proper accounting. Mr. Kato wants the accounting to include rents collected from New Mexico. Court questions the juridication over out of state rents. Court is not going to require Ms. Martinez to include the rents collected from New Mexico in her accounting. Court wants receipt from Mr. Garcia and proof of Mr. Garcia paying Kaiser for the decedent. With Ms. Martinez in Court, Court is ordering her to file an amended accounting by 12/11. If the accounting is filed by 12/11, no appearance is required on 12/11. Hearing for the accounting is set on 1/8/07. Both the petition to determine title and the Order to Show Cause are continued to 12/11. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Title To & Require Transfer Of Personal & Real Property To Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for administrator. Terrence Murphy appearing for and with Cynthia Martinez. Court has not review the accounting. Mr. Kato saw it this morning. He wants Ms. Martinez to file an inventory and an accounting and verification. Ms. Martinez argued that she has POA on the Bank of America account and she is not able to get bank records. Mr. Kato is willing to help her get the bank records but she should pay for it. Court wants Ms. Martinez to start with a list of personal items. She is to file a verified accounting. If bank records are needed to prepare her accounting, she should pay for it. Matter is continued to 11/20. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for petitioner. Cynthia Martinez is in court. Mr. Kato informs the court that they are working on settlement. He is requesting for continuance. Matter is continued to 8/2. Court orders Ms. Martinez to appear on 8/7 if matter is not settled. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To Jul-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for petitioner Maria Vargas. Counsel informs the court that Cynthia Martinez's son has given him a letter stating that Ms. Martinez is in the hospital. The letter is not signed. The Court has excused Ms. Martinez appearance for today. She has failed to file an accounting. OSC will be issued to her. Return date is 7/5. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kenny Lewis.

Petition To Determine Title To & Require Transfer Of Personal & Real Property To Estate.
Off Calendar May-17-2006 Continued To May-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brent Kato appearing for administrator, Maria Vargas. Cynthia Martinez is in court. Ms. Martinez wants more time to obtain counsel. Matter is continued to 5/24 for appearance by her counsel. Court orders Ms. Martinez to prepare an accounting by her best ability by 5/24. Her request to be excused on 5/24 due to her going in for surgery is approved. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
